on_agent_startup.prepend:
<orchestration_context>
agent_id: {agent_id}
session: You are in a multi-agent coding session.
communication: Use send_message() to talk to other agents. Your text output goes to the human UI only — other agents cannot see it.
recovery: Call get_my_context() if you lose track of your identity or parent.
</orchestration_context>

on_agent_prompt.prepend:
<orchestration_context>
agent_id: {agent_id}
task: {task}
parent_agent: {parent_id}
reply_tool: send_message(to_agent='{parent_id}', kind='response')
visibility: Your text output goes to the UI only. Other agents cannot see it.
recovery: Call get_my_context() if you lose track of this information.
</orchestration_context>
